revision.comment: Use [[Special:EditPage]]
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Multiple_issues]]
Match wording of [[Module:Message box/configuration]], invoke [[Module:Message box]] directly
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia4]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>SWinxy|wikipedia>SWinxy]]
1 revision imported: importing to remove the ns-draft links
Match wording of [[Module:Message box/configuration]], invoke [[Module:Message box]] directly
1 revision imported: overwriting
Match wording of [[Module:Message box/configuration]], invoke [[Module:Message box]] directly
1 revision imported: trying to get the ambox in
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Removing from [[Category:Ambox transclusions]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B= {{#invoke:Message box|ambox |name = Multiple issues |templatestyles = Multiple issues/styles.css |doc = no |subst = {{subst:substcheck}} |class = ambox-multiple_issues compact-ambox |type = content |removalnotice = yes |cat=Articles with multiple maintenance issues |text =
'''This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|article}} has multiple issues.''' Please help '''[[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|improve it]]''' or discuss these issues on the '''[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]'''. ''([[Help:Maintenance template removal|Learn how and when to remove these messages]])'' {{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=style="display: none"|replace=|count=}}
| {{error|No issues specified. Please specify issues, or remove this template.}} }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[Category:Pages using multiple issues with unknown parameters|§{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using multiple issues with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Multiple issues]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | collapsed | section }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:S that add a tracking category]] to [[Category:reimport]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B= {{#invoke:Message box|ambox |name = Multiple issues |templatestyles = Multiple issues/styles.css |doc = no |subst = {{subst:substcheck}} |class = ambox-multiple_issues compact-ambox |type = content |removalnotice = yes |cat=Articles with multiple maintenance issues |text =
'''This {{#if:{{{section|}}}|section|article}} has multiple issues.''' Please help '''[[Special:EditPage/{{FULLPAGENAME}}|improve it]]''' or discuss these issues on the '''[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|talk page]]'''. ''([[Help:Maintenance template removal|Learn how and when to remove these messages]])'' {{#if:{{{1|}}} |
{{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=style="display: none"|replace=|count=}}
| {{error|No issues specified. Please specify issues, or remove this template.}} }}
{{#if:{{{2|}}}|[[Category:Pages using multiple issues with unknown parameters|§{{PAGENAME}}]]}} }}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{main other|[[Category:Pages using multiple issues with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:Multiple issues]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|ignoreblank=y| 1 | 2 | collapsed | section }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:reimport]]

revision.comment: [[Category:Articles with multiple maintenance issues]] is not dated, so it should be in |all= rather than |cat=.
1 revision imported: overwriting
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23515111839|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||$B= {{#invoke:Message box|ambox |name = Multiple issues |templatestyles = Multiple issues/styles.css |doc = no |subst = {{subst:substcheck}} |class = ambox-multiple_issues compact-ambox |type = content |removalnotice = yes |all = Articles with multiple maintenance issues |text =

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
